title: Unbreakable Blocks Viewer
description: Only work with Unbreakable Blocks mod by Mark_Loyd.
body:
**This ressource pack only work with [Unbreakable Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/unbreakable-blocks) mod by Mark_Loyd.**

It allow the user to see the unbreakables blocks from the mod of the same name. It's mostly reserved for the admin/builder.
